schema.idea: Weekly surge in freight logistics RSS counts on delayed container ships

data.source: public RSS feeds on maritime freight delays

schema.behavior: Spike in news mentioning container ship delays signals supply chain stress that pressures industrial production timelines.

market_impact.rationale: Industrial sector earnings are sensitive to freight bottlenecks and delayed shipments.

trade_logic.entry: If weekly RSS count on container delay keywords increases 30% over prior week
trade_logic.exit: After 3 weeks or when RSS count normalizes below 10% above baseline

schema.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Freight delays news volume fluctuates weekly due to port congestion and weather events.
